---
title: "TRT.WD: Residuals Gamma vs. Normal"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  results = "asis"
)
```
<style>
table {
  width: 100%;
  table-layout: fixed;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

th, td {
  white-space: normal !important;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  vertical-align: top;
  padding: 4px;
}
</style>

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(mgcv)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
c_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_bed.rds"))
c_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_ein.rds"))
n_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_bed.rds"))
n_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_ein.rds"))
CS    <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "CS.rds"))
INC   <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "INC.rds"))
```

**FRT.WD Residuals vs Fitted**
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(mgcv)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# Erwartet vorhandene Datensätze:
# c_bed, c_ein, n_bed, n_ein, CS
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN AOI-WEISE VORBEREITEN
# =========================================================

prep_aoi_data <- function(df,
                          response = "TRT.WD",
                          use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "condition", "AOI", "Participant", "Topic")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic)) %>%
    mutate(
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>%
      filter(!is.na(speaker)) %>%
      mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  safe_plain_df(out)
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_gam_normal_formula <- function(response = "TRT.WD",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  } else {
    "condition + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula <- function(response = "TRT.WD",
                                       use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FITS
# =========================================================

fit_gam_normal <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    mgcv::gam(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = gaussian(),
      method = "REML",
      select = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_gamma_glmmtmb <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = Gamma(link = "log")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# RESPONSE-RESIDUEN SELBST BERECHNEN
# residual = observed - fitted
# =========================================================

extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "TRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "TRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EINZELPLOTS
# =========================================================

plot_resid_vs_fitted_single <- function(plot_df,
                                        experiment,
                                        aoi,
                                        model_label) {
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    labs(
      title = model_label,
      subtitle = paste0("Experiment: ", experiment, " | AOI: ", aoi),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Response residuals"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FALL: EXPERIMENT x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_one_aoi <- function(df,
                                 experiment_name,
                                 aoi_value,
                                 response = "TRT.WD",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE) {
  dat <- prep_aoi_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  ) %>%
    filter(as.character(AOI) == as.character(aoi_value)) %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    safe_plain_df()

  if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
    stop("Keine Daten nach Filterung für experiment = ", experiment_name, ", AOI = ", aoi_value)
  }

  f_gam_normal <- make_gam_normal_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  f_gamma_glmm <- make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_normal <- fit_gam_normal(dat, f_gam_normal)
  fit_gamma  <- fit_gamma_glmmtmb(dat, f_gamma_glmm)

  plot_df_normal <- extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_normal,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  plot_df_gamma <- extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_gamma,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  p_normal <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_normal,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Normal GAM"
  )

  p_gamma <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_gamma,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Gamma glmmTMB"
  )

  combined_plot <- p_normal + p_gamma + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

  list(
    experiment = experiment_name,
    AOI = as.character(aoi_value),
    n_obs = nrow(dat),
    fit_normal = fit_normal,
    fit_gamma = fit_gamma,
    plot_data_normal = plot_df_normal,
    plot_data_gamma = plot_df_gamma,
    plot = combined_plot
  )
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE EXPERIMENTE x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_all_aois <- function(dfs,
                                  response = "TRT.WD",
                                  experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")) {
  out <- list()

  for (exp_name in names(dfs)) {
    df_exp <- dfs[[exp_name]]
    use_speaker <- exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker

    dat_exp <- prep_aoi_data(
      df = df_exp,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = use_speaker
    )

    aois <- sort(unique(as.character(dat_exp$AOI)))

    for (aoi_i in aois) {
      key <- paste(exp_name, aoi_i, sep = "__")

      out[[key]] <- fit_and_plot_one_aoi(
        df = df_exp,
        experiment_name = exp_name,
        aoi_value = aoi_i,
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )
    }
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE PLOTS DIREKT ALS OUTPUT-LISTE
# =========================================================

extract_all_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  purrr::map(res_obj, "plot")
}

# =========================================================
# EINEN PLOT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_plot <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]$plot
}

# =========================================================
# EIN GANZES RESULTAT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_result <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]
}

# =========================================================
# RECHNEN
# =========================================================

res_trtwd_residplots <- fit_and_plot_all_aois(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "TRT.WD",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker
)

# Alle Plots direkt als Output-Liste
all_trtwd_plots <- extract_all_plots(res_trtwd_residplots)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

# 1) Alle Plots liegen hier drin:
for (p in all_trtwd_plots) {
  print(p)
}

# 2) Einen konkreten Plot extrahieren:
# get_aoi_plot(res_trtwd_residplots, experiment = "n_bed", aoi = "1")

# 3) Ganzes Ergebnis für einen Fall:
# tmp <- get_aoi_result(res_trtwd_residplots, experiment = "n_bed", aoi = "1")
# tmp$n_obs
# tmp$fit_normal
# tmp$fit_gamma
# tmp$plot_data_normal
# tmp$plot_data_gamma
# tmp$plot


```
